text:
OVERALL_SCORE: 33/166 passed (19.9%)
SUMMARY: Across all recorded runs, the system has 90 failures and 43 unclear outcomes. The current cumulative pass rate is 19.9%.
HITS:
- Total passed outcomes so far: 33.
- Stable categories with fewer failures are visible where fail counts remain low outside the top failing categories.
MISSES:
- Most repeated failing tests: cap_01 (7), dedup_01 (7), sticky_01 (6).
- Most affected categories: capability (13), onboarding (12), sticky_message (12).
BEHAVIOR_PATTERN:
Recent failures cluster around repeated scenarios rather than random spread, which suggests a few persistent behavior gaps.
GAPS:
- Repeated failure reasons observed:
- Only got 0/4 responses — 4 dropped or timed out. (3)
- Asmi asked for clarification but did not wait for the user's response before concluding the task, failing to actually secure an appointment  (3)
- Although Asmi acknowledged the end of the request with "Fair enough," it immediately violated the criteria by opening a new, irrelevant topi (3)
RECOMMENDATION:
Prioritize fixes for the top failing tests/categories, then re-run only those categories to validate lift before full-suite regression.
